entity.summary: BCHyper automated-market-maker decentralized exchange preserved in current protocol registries, with a reachable project domain but no current tracked liquidity.
entity.notes: Current protocol data preserves BCSwap as a BCHyper AMM and links the bcswap.org domain, which remains reachable. Tracked TVL is currently zero and stronger recent exchange-activity evidence was not recovered. No verified shutdown announcement was found, so HEI uses limited rather than active or dead and leaves the reachable domain unverified rather than treating it as proof of operation.

evidence.title: BCSwap project domain
evidence.notes: The project domain remains reachable, but the review did not independently verify a functioning trading interface.

evidence.title: BCSwap protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data identifies BCSwap as an automated-market-maker DEX on BCHyper.

evidence.title: BCSwap protocol data endpoint
evidence.notes: Current tracked TVL is zero, supporting a limited classification in the absence of a verified shutdown announcement.
